title: Opening for Production Engineer at Nocil

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Nocil
jsonLd.description:
Nocil has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
